items.title: Obsidian
items.description: A second brain, for you, forever. The best note-taking app for linking your thinking.

items.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
items.description: Your journey to mastery. A classic book that every developer should read at least once.

items.title: Figma
items.description: The collaborative interface design tool. Essential for modern web design workflows.

items.title: Syntax.fm
items.description: A Tasty Treats Podcast for Web Developers. Wes Bos and Scott Tolinski break down complex topics.

items.title: Vercel
items.description: Develop. Preview. Ship. The best platform for frontend frameworks and static sites.

items.title: Refactoring UI
items.description: Learn how to design beautiful user interfaces by yourself using specific tactics.

content:
# Curated List

A collection of tools, books, and resources that power my workflow and inspire my thinking.
